name: Tortilla Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips and mix with 2 cups of sour cream. Allow to cool.
2. Spread one-third cup of the mixture on each tortilla, layering them.
3. Do not place additional chocolate on top.
4. Chill the assembled layers.
5. Mix 1 cup of sour cream with 1/4 cup of powdered sugar and ice cake.
6. Chill the mixture.
7. Before serving, garnish with fruit jam.
8. Keep refrigerated. The flavor improves if allowed to stand for 1 to 2 days.
